commit.message:
Replace line break after careers intro with visible divider

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: consolidate dual Cargo workspace into single root manifest (#39)

* refactor: consolidate dual Cargo workspace into single root manifest

The repo had two `[workspace]` Cargo.toml files (root and crates/). Cargo
doesn't support nested workspaces, causing CI issues (wasm-pack picking up
the wrong manifest) and dependency divergence between the two manifests.

This consolidates to a single root workspace manifest by:
- Merging the richer dependency set from crates/Cargo.toml into root
- Bumping diverged versions (tokio 1.40, thiserror 2.0, uuid 1.10, etc.)
- Adding missing deps (bytes, sqlx, deltalake, uniffi, mockall)
- Adding tls feature to tonic, opt-level=3 and lto=fat to release profile
- Removing crates/Cargo.toml
- Updating CI, justfile, Makefile to run cargo from repo root
- Updating 4 Rust Dockerfiles to use root Cargo.toml and target path

Verified: cargo check, cargo test (215 tests), and cargo clippy all pass
from the repo root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(wasm): resolve getrandom 0.3.x and proptest compilation for wasm32

- Add getrandom with js feature to workspace deps (getrandom 0.3.x
  requires explicit backend for wasm32-unknown-unknown)
- Move proptest to non-wasm dev-deps in experimentation-hash (proptest
  pulls rusty-fork → wait-timeout which uses OS process APIs)
- Gate test_range on non-wasm since it uses uuid (already non-wasm only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): restore gen/go/go.mod after artifact download overwrites it

The download-artifact step overwrites gen/ with buf-generated code from
the schema job, which doesn't include go.mod/go.sum. The root go.work
references ./gen/go as a workspace module, so Go commands fail when
go.mod is missing. Restore the checked-in module files from git after
the artifact download.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): create gen/go/go.mod inline instead of git checkout

gen/go/ is in .gitignore so git checkout cannot restore go.mod/go.sum.
Instead, create go.mod with the correct module path and dependencies
inline, then run go mod download to generate go.sum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: MySQL initdb TLS + auth plugin compatibility

- Add --ssl=0 to mysql client in initdb.sh: Alpine's mariadb-client
  rejects MySQL 8.0's self-signed TLS cert without this flag
- Add --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password to MySQL
  StatefulSet args: mariadb-client cannot use caching_sha2_password
- Set pullPolicy: Always for all GHCR images (latest tag should always
  pull the newest build, not use stale cached version)

Fix voice UX: faster auto-record (800→200ms) + toggle always clickable

- Reduce auto-record delay from 800ms to 200ms — TTS has already
  finished when onEnd fires, only need minimal echo buffer. Cuts
  ~600ms off perceived latency before mic starts capturing.
- Add relative z-20 to voice toggle button so it renders above the
  recording/transcribing overlays (z-10). User can always tap it
  instead of chasing it during brief idle windows.

Performance: collapse query waterfall, faster stagger, non-blocking auth

Combine 3 sequential Convex subscriptions (getCurrentUser, getByAuthAccount,
getPersonalCanvas) into a single getUserWithCanvas query. Replace blocking
onMount auth poll with reactive $effect. Reduce stagger animation from
60ms to 30ms per object. Saves ~440ms on initial page load.

commit.message:
fix: use raw millisecond math for labeling job elapsed time

intervalToDuration from date-fns decomposes into calendar units
(months, days, hours) which can lose time across date boundaries.
Replace with simple total-seconds math that correctly handles
multi-day durations (e.g., 1d 8h 20m instead of just 8h 20m).

Fix stuck pending runs and crash recovery (#1)

- Fix UI bug where 'pending' status showed terminate button instead of delete. Pending runs are not actually running (orchestrator never reached startRun), so they can only be deleted, not stopped.
- Enhance crash recovery to catch runs stuck in 'initializing' status with null active_status (server crashed before startRun was called). These are marked as 'failed' if older than 5 minutes.

This fixes the issue where runs like 'nebula-maa1fqm' become permanently stuck pending and can't be terminated or deleted.

Fix circle drawing minimum size to scale with zoom level

Threshold for click detection and minimum radius now divide by zoom,

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ble): treat "Notify acquired" as non-fatal success

BlueZ "Notify acquired" means notifications are already active at
D-Bus level. Bleak registers the Python callback BEFORE calling
D-Bus StartNotify, so our callback works regardless.

Previous approach (disconnect-reconnect) made things worse by
exhausting connection slots and losing the device from BlueZ cache.

Now we simply log the error as info and proceed to handshake.
If notifications truly aren't flowing, the handshake will timeout
naturally.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use AllowOriginFunc for CORS to fix credentials + wildcard mismatch

The Echo CORS middleware with AllowOrigins sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin
to the literal configured value. When combined with AllowCredentials: true,
a wildcard "*" causes browsers to reject the response (CORS spec forbids
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with credentials).

Switching to AllowOriginFunc makes the middleware echo back the request's
actual origin, which is spec-compliant with credentials. Also adds
case-insensitive matching and origin normalization (trim trailing slashes)
to prevent config mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add [build-system] section to pyproject.toml to fix fami-synth command

does not install it, causing the fami-synth entry point to be unavailable.

Closes #5

commit.message:
fix: correct PolyCV ES-5 routing for gates, pitch, and paraphonic gate

Gate outputs were incorrectly consuming bus slots when routed to ES-5,
causing pitch/velocity outputs to have wrong bus numbers. Also adds
proper handling for the new Paraphonic gate parameter and fixes ES-5
toggle indicators to only appear on gate output ports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(shared): harden database connection pool for Lambda (#490) (#491)

- Add pool.on('error') handler to prevent process crashes on idle
  connection backend errors (SEC-1, CVSS 7.5)
- Increase pool max from 5 to 10 for parallel hybrid search headroom
  (PERF-1)
- Share singleton pool with PostgresSaver checkpointer instead of
  creating a second unmanaged pool via fromConnString() (PERF-3)
- Remove checkpointer.end() from runner.close() to prevent destroying
  the shared pool
- Add concurrency limit (MAX_CONCURRENT_SEARCHES=2) to retrieval
  expander to cap fan-out at 4 concurrent DB connections

commit.message:
Fix data races, immutability, and error handling from code audit

- trust/model: upgrade Score/ScoreInDomain from RLock to Lock (getOrCreate writes)
- authority/chain: add RWMutex to protect policies slice
- decision/tree+evaluate: add Mutex to DecisionTree and LeafNode for stats
- event/factory: defensive copy of causes slice in Create
- store/memory: replace magic string with EventTypeEdgeCreated, surface edge errors
- bus: reject Subscribe on closed bus

All tests pass with -race.
